title: Strip private orchestrator content from opensubagents outcomes-mcp leaving only the public MCP server surface
question: Does opensubagents outcomes-mcp drop the QUEUE.md the /loop heartbeat the per-tick outcome+report pairs the runrocs the eval matrix the orchestrator subagent definitions and the statusline-usage so that this repo is reduced to the public-facing MCP server surface while the private orchestration substrate continues operating from the new private repo subagentceo outcomes-orchestrator?
success_criteria: outcomes QUEUE md is git removed because the queue model is private and now lives at subagentceo outcomes-orchestrator outcomes QUEUE md
outcomes tick- prefixed outcome+report pairs are git removed because they were per-tick artifacts of the heartbeat and now live in the private repo
outcomes runrocs directory and the evals directory are git removed because they were operational state not consumable as public artifacts

claude loop-prompt md claude dispatch json claude agents subdirectory scripts eval sh scripts dispatch-test sh docs adrs and RESUME md are all git removed because each is part of the private operational substrate

outcomes bootstrap json pair and outcomes orchestrator-bootstrap json pair remain because they document the gate of the MCP server itself and the historical admission of the orchestrator pattern respectively
README md gains a Split note section that links to the private repo and confirms the public surface is now only the MCP server
the outcome-gate workflow scores this PR at or above the 3.5 floor against the python HeuristicVerifier

capabilities: loop-prompt md dispatch json agents subdirectory removed
eval sh and dispatch-test sh removed
docs adrs and RESUME md removed
outcome-gate PR passes at or above 3.5
